records.question: What organisations have organisation_details exactly equal to eveniet?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
WHERE organisations.organisation_details = 'eveniet'
records.pred_sql: SELECT organisation_id FROM Organisations WHERE organisation_details = 'eveniet'

records.question: Which organisations that have related grants, organisation types, projects, and research staff records have organisation details exactly equal to 'officiis', projects with project details exactly equal to 'deserunt', research staff with staff details exactly equal to 'nulla', and an organisation type description exactly equal to 'Sponsor'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE organisations.organisation_details = 'officiis' AND projects.project_details = 'deserunt' AND research_staff.staff_details = 'nulla' AND organisation_types.organisation_type_description = 'Sponsor'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT o.organisation_id
FROM Organisations o
JOIN Organisation_Types ot ON o.organisation_type = ot.organisation_type
JOIN Grants g ON o.organisation_id = g.organisation_id
JOIN Projects p ON o.organisation_id = p.organisation_id
JOIN Research_Staff rs ON o.organisation_id = rs.employer_organisation_id
WHERE o.organisation_details = 'officiis'
  AND p.project_details = 'deserunt'
  AND rs.staff_details = 'nulla'
  AND ot.organisation_type_description = 'Sponsor'
